task:
I like your something stranger idea, keep it. 
What if it went down like this, an architect found an interesting artifact in a place it didn't quite belong. When the architect picked it up, jumper appealed to some aspect of the diver and found a new host. When they surfaced, the eye, lethe-light, vault-security quickly convinced the jumper he was better of in the artifact. now with the eye gone...
